SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 75427855): REIS, DAIVID J. SUBSTITUTED FOR MERONEY, MILLICENT S AS ATTORNEY FOR HINT, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-23-2025 RE: MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. "ON PETITION OF A PARTY TO AN ARBITRATION AGREEMENT ALLEGING THE EXISTENCE OF A WRITTEN AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE A CONTROVERSY AND THAT A PARTY TO THE AGREEMENT REFUSES TO ARBITRATE THAT CONTROVERSY, THE COURT SHALL ORDER THE PETITIONER AND THE RESPONDENT TO ARBITRATE THE CONTROVERSY IF IT DETERMINES THAT AN AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE THE CONTROVERSY EXISTS." SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING, IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312, AND MUST EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT301TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. COURT REPORTER: TECKLA PRATT, CSR: 13125; T: (310) 490-4905; E: TECKLAPRATT@GMAIL.COM. (301/HK)

Blake Osborn, Esq. 213-243-6043, Sarah Gates, Esq. 212-398-5232 Dentons US LLP for Plaintiff.
Millicent Meroney, Esq. 415-578-6900 O'Haga Meyer for Defendant Hint.

ARGUED. M.r Blake Osborn counsel for Plantiff contests the tentative ruling and argues. The Court shares its comments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFFS KARA GOLDIN and THEODORE GOLDIN's Motion To File Documents Under Seal Pursuant To C.R.C. 2.550.

Plaintiffs Kara Goldin and Theodore Goldin's motion to seal to which no opposition has been filed is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

(see word minutes for full details)

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.
